steps.title: Identify what the conclusion requires
steps.content: The hypothesis holds for charges above a threshold, and queen honeybees exceed it (so they attract). To extend to another pollinator, that pollinator's charge must also be above the threshold shown in the graph.

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content:
(C) says red mason bees can also attract the stamens — supported if the graph shows red mason bees also have a charge above the threshold (which the source data shows).

(A) is logically reversed. (B) is unsupported. (D) misstates the threshold.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
